tasks.label: 🔀 Switch to: TEST
tasks.command: git checkout test && cp .env.test .env.local && echo '✓ Switched to TEST environment'

tasks.label: 🔀 Switch to: MAIN (Production)
tasks.command: git checkout main && cp .env.production .env.local && echo '✓ Switched to MAIN (Production) environment'

tasks.label: 📝 Create: TEST branch
tasks.command: git checkout -b test 2>/dev/null || git checkout test && echo '✓ TEST branch ready'

tasks.label: 🔗 Merge: TEST → MAIN (for production)
tasks.command: git checkout main && git pull origin main && git merge test --no-edit && git push origin main && echo '✓ TEST merged into MAIN and pushed to GitHub'
